flavorPhrases: Sealed behind a mortared niche. The brickwork was newer than the wall around it — someone hid this deliberately.
Inside a collapsed ossuary alcove, half-buried under bone and stone dust.
Beneath a toppled sarcophagus lid. The weight of the stone kept everything underneath dry.
In a recess behind a votive shelf. The offerings in front were undisturbed — this was placed after the burial.
Wrapped in a funeral shroud and tucked behind a row of skulls. Not part of the interment.
Under loose flagstones in a side passage. The mortar was old, but the chisel marks were not.

sword: A {name} wrapped in waxed linen that has gone brittle. The blade is dry and clean — the wrapping did its job.
A {name} in a scabbard stiff with verdigris. The steel inside is untouched by the damp. Cold to the touch.
axe: A {name} coated in bone dust. The haft is pale and waxy but the head is spotless beneath the grime.
A {name}. The leather grip has gone hard and white, but the edge beneath the dust is keen.
dagger: A {name} in a sheath stained green with copper corrosion. The blade inside is bright and cold.
A {name} wrapped in funeral linen. The cloth is stiff but the steel is clean.
bludgeon: A {name} thick with calcium deposits. Scrape them away and the surface beneath is smooth.
A {name}. The grip wrapping has calcified but the head is pristine underneath.
polearm: A {name} propped against the wall like a walking staff. Bone dust has settled in every joint, but the blade is clean.
A {name} with a film of white mineral residue. It wipes away to reveal bright steel.
ranged: A {name} stored in an alcove away from the damp. The string has survived — unusual underground.
A {name} wrapped in oiled cloth that has gone stiff. The limbs are straight and the draw is smooth.
heavy_armor: A {name} standing upright in a burial niche, as though placed on a stand that has since rotted away. The plates are clean.
A {name} laid flat on a stone shelf. Mineral seepage has crusted the surface, but underneath the steel is bright.
light_armor: A {name} folded inside a stone container. The cold and the dark have preserved it better than any tanner could.
A {name} wrapped in waxed cloth. The wax has gone white but the leather beneath is supple.
shield: A {name} propped face-down against the wall. The back is thick with dust but the face is unmarked.
A {name} stored behind a row of urns. Bone dust coats the grip but the boss is clean.
cloak: A {name} folded inside a sealed stone box. The seal crumbles but the fabric inside is whole.
A {name} that smells of old incense and cold stone. No moth damage. The underground cold kept them out.
boots: A pair of {name} wrapped in funeral cloth. The leather is cold but supple — the crypt conditions preserved them.
A pair of {name} tucked behind a sarcophagus. Dust-caked but undamaged.
ring: A ring inside a small clay vessel, sealed with wax. The seal is intact. The metal inside is warm to the touch.
A ring on a skeletal finger. It slides free easily. The metal has not corroded.
potion: A glass vial bedded in wax inside a stone niche. The cold has kept the contents stable.
A stoppered flask wrapped in strips of linen. The wax seal is white with age but unbroken.
scroll: A scroll tube sealed with lead solder. The cold and the dark have preserved the contents perfectly.
A bone scroll case with a wax-sealed cap. The parchment inside is dry and crisp.
generic: A {name} wrapped in funeral cloth. The linen is stiff with age but what it protected is pristine.
A {name} sealed inside a stone niche. Mineral deposits frame the opening but the contents are untouched.
A {name}. The crypt has preserved it better than any vault. Cold, dark, and dry.
